title: Amtech G4518 Set of 2 Wood Scraper Blades, 2.5-inch 4 Edges, 6.5cm x 6.3cm, Compatible with Amtech G4515
features: This set of blades are compatible with the Amtech G4515 Heavy Duty Wood Scraper.
Ideal for the rapid preparation of wooden painted surfaces, removing loose putty and vinyl, as well as, patching dents and addressing wall cracks – when fitted to a compatible scraper.
Pack contains two hardened carbon steel 2.5-inch scraper blades
Approx. size of the 4 edge blades is 6.5cm x 6.3cm
Note: Please handle with care when using or changing sharp blades and kindly store in a safe place, to keep away from children. Not for sale to people under the age of 18 years.
description: Product Description The Amtech G4518 4-Edge Wood Scraper Blade Set contains 2 x 2.5 inch hardened carbon steel blades. Compatible with the Amtech G4515 Heavy Duty Wood Scraper. Alongside scraping tasks, you can also use these blades for removing loose putty and vinyl, as well as, patching dents and addressing wall cracks – when fitted to a compatible scraper. Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less. Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
